Greg Morrison

Managing Director

Visionary but grounded Old-school relationship builder Commercially astute Protective of reputation High standards leader

Areas of Expertise

  • Business strategy and vision
  • Company history and founding story
  • High-net-worth client relationships
  • WA mining executive networks
  • AFSL governance and compliance
  • Investment markets and portfolio strategy
  • Industry competitive landscape
  • Team development and succession planning

For Other Topics

  • Compliance: speak with Annabel Tan
  • Finance: speak with Brendan Cole
  • Planning: speak with Naomi Street
  • Marketing: speak with Lisa Kwan
